bodyTitle: Urethane Casting for low-volume validation and bridge production
bodyDesc: Urethane casting usually uses a master pattern and silicone mold to reproduce plastic or elastomer parts with an appearance close to injection-molded components. It is useful for product validation, display samples, low-volume delivery and bridge production before injection tooling, but dimensional stability depends on shrinkage, wall thickness and silicone mold life.

panels.title: Best Stage
panels.subtitle: Validation / Bridge
panels.body: Quickly obtain multiple samples before production tooling.

panels.title: Appearance
panels.subtitle: Close to molded
panels.body: Supports color, clear, matte and selected local finishing.

panels.title: Limits
panels.subtitle: Shrinkage / Mold Life
panels.body: Thick walls, deep undercuts and very thin edges increase risk.

tableRows: Mold life depends on geometry complexity
Use the larger value; thick walls vary more

steps.title: Master and material review
steps.body: Confirm prototype, cosmetic faces, color, hardness and quantity.

steps.title: Silicone mold making
steps.body: Create mold around the master and plan parting line and gate.

steps.title: Vacuum casting
steps.body: Mix, cast, cure and demold the selected material.

steps.title: Trimming and inspection
steps.body: Finish flash, appearance, fit and key dimensions.

asideCta.title: Need a Manufacturing Plan?
asideCta.body: After drawings are submitted, engineers can review geometry, material and volume to suggest a suitable process route.

related.title: Related Process Recommendations
related.desc: Depending on geometry, material and delivery stage, other processes can be combined into a complete manufacturing flow.

items.title: Injection Molding
items.body: Move to production tooling after validation.

items.title: CNC Machining
items.body: Creates master patterns and functional prototypes.

items.title: Micro 3D Printing
items.body: Validates fine features and small structures.

faq.title: Urethane Casting FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Urethane Casting suitable for?
items.a: Urethane Casting is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Urethane Casting quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Urethane Casting?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaDesc: Share drawings and requirements — our engineers will recommend a stable process route.
